source_note: Notice of Filing by the Utilities Division of the Tennessee Public Utility Commission of the Weather Normalization Adjustment (WNA) Audit re Atmos Energy Corporation, Docket No. 25-00044, July 18, 2025 — the Division's audit of Atmos's WNA gas-cost mechanism (20 pp).
